title: Senior Software Engineer - Lybrate - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lybrate - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
